message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.clip (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.clip:

- clip_both_bounds: 4-row 2-col frame, lower=0 / upper=10 — values
  outside the band are clamped per cell
- clip_lower_only: 3-row 1-col frame, lower=0 (no upper) — negatives
  clipped to 0, positives unchanged

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.clip(lower=, upper=)), runs the Rust DataFrame.clip(lower,
upper), and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected.
DataFrameClip was already wired through the Frame response branch;
this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-eu5ow]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
